title: TFC Atlases
description: Compability between TFC and Map Atlases
body:
This just adds a recipe that uses the glue item from TFC to craft atlases from Map Atlases.
Enjoy

If you are also using Firma:Civilization install my other mod instead: [TFCivilization Atlases](https://modrinth.com/mod/tfcivilization-atlases).
It instead gives a recipe that is balanced regarding the neccecary tools to see ones coordinates in Firma:Civilization.
